Meet Meryl

Hi, I'm Meryl.

I grew up in Johnson County, Kansas, where I spent twelve years as a competitive swimmer before deciding to see what life looked like beyond the pool. That decision led me to Pittsburg State University, where I earned my degree in Physical Education with an emphasis in strength and conditioning, graduating with a 4.0 in my major along with minors in psychology and biology.

Today I live in Springfield, Missouri, where I stay active through CrossFit and continue learning about strength, movement, and nutrition. My goal is simple: to help people take care of their machine, body and mind, inside and out. I believe a strong, efficient body paired with a strong, positive outlook is one of the biggest keys to a good life, and massage therapy is one of the most powerful tools I have to help people get there.

Strength & Conditioning Holistic Wellness Pain Relief Mind & Body
Modalities

Techniques & Care

Every session is tailored to what your body needs that day, drawing from a range of proven techniques.

01

Deep Tissue

Targeted pressure to release chronic tension and muscle tightness.

02

Hot Stone

Heated stones to melt away tension and improve circulation.

03

Aromatic Oils

Essential oils layered in to calm the nervous system as you relax.

04

Chair Massage

A quicker, fully clothed option focused on the neck, back, and shoulders.

05

Shoulders & Scalp

Relieve where you hold the most stress, from the neck up.

06

Back, Arms & Legs

Full body work to restore mobility and ease tension everywhere it hides.

07

Feet

Grounding, restorative work for the part of you that carries it all.

Why Massage Therapy

Real Relief, Backed by Results

Beyond relaxation, massage therapy offers real medical and mental health benefits, thanks to a hands on, holistic approach to healing the whole person, not just the sore spot.

Physical Wellness

Lowers blood pressure, improves circulation, and releases endorphins, reducing physical tension while increasing emotional calm.

Pain & Recovery Support

Relieves acute and chronic pain from headaches, back problems, and muscle spasms, and supports recovery after heart or cancer surgery.

Immune & Whole Body Health

Immediate results, no medication required. Known to boost the immune system and improve overall mobility and well being.
